title: The Bride! review: Maggie Gyllenhaal doubles down on everything Poor Things did with Frankenstein
summary: Christian Bale and Jessie Buckley star in this wild, messy rewrite of Bride of Frankenstein, by way of Bonnie and Clyde, punk rock, and Lady Gaga.

title: These Pokémon 30th anniversary rugs are perfect and impossible to buy
summary: Pokémon's new rug collection from Miyoshi Rug gives us the perfect Snorlax and Ditto rugs, but at a high price.

summary: Our Resident Evil Requiem mod picks include difficulty modifiers, reshaders for visual enhancements, and some costume changes for Leon Kennedy

summary: DC Comics' next big release is August's Green Lantern show on HBO. But what does it say about Paramount's WB acquisition?

summary: Game Freak, Koei Tecmo, and The Pokemon Company come together to show off their impressive Pokopia bases powered by switches and logic tools.

title: D&D Beyond now labels 2024 Dungeons & Dragons rules as 5.5e
summary: After nearly two years without any clarity or branding, we now have an official name for D&D 5e (2024) — or at least how it appears in D&D Beyond.

summary: Streamlined versions of D&D 5th edition rules and a character sheet covered with pictures are meant to make the TTRPG more accessible.
